arrayOfTransitRequestBean_1.message:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?> <ns2:Msg xmlns:ns2="http://brz.gv.at/ezoll/V01" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"> <ns2:MsgSdr>Wirtschaftsbeteiligter</ns2:MsgSdr> <ns2:MsgRcp>NTA.AT</ns2:MsgRcp> <ns2:PrepDT>{{object.PrepDT}}</ns2:PrepDT> <ns2:ICRef>{{object.ICRef}}</ns2:ICRef> <ns2:Appl>acc</ns2:Appl> <ns2:Test>1</ns2:Test> <ns2:MsgTyp>CC014C</ns2:MsgTyp> <!--_______________________________________End of AT Header_________________________________________-->
<ns4:CC014C xmlns:ns4="urn:eds:datamodel:EDS:EDS_EXTENSIONS:1" xmlns:ns3="http://ncts.dgtaxud.ec"> <Extensions> <ns3:SequenceNumeric>{{object.SequenceNumeric}}</ns3:SequenceNumeric> <ns3:Key>{{object.Key}}</ns3:Key> <ns3:Value>{{object.Value}}</ns3:Value> <ns3:DataType>{{object.DataType}}</ns3:DataType> </Extensions> <messageSender>{{object.messageSender}}</messageSender> <messageRecipient>{{object.messageRecipient}}</messageRecipient> <preparationDateAndTime>{{object.preparationDateAndTime}}</preparationDateAndTime> <messageIdentification>{{object.messageIdentification}}</messageIdentification> <messageType>{{object.messageType}}</messageType> <correlationIdentifier>{{object.correlationIdentifier}}</correlationIdentifier> <TransitOperation> <MRN>{{object.MRN}}</MRN> </TransitOperation> <Invalidation> <requestDateAndTime>{{object.requestDateAndTime}}</requestDateAndTime> <initiatedByCustoms>{{object.initiatedByCustoms}}</initiatedByCustoms> <justification>{{object.justification}}</justification> </Invalidation> <CustomsOfficeOfDeparture> <referenceNumber>{{object.referenceNumber}}</referenceNumber> </CustomsOfficeOfDeparture> <HolderOfTheTransitProcedure> <identificationNumber>{{object.identificationNumber}}</identificationNumber> <ContactPerson> <name>{{object.name}}</name> <phoneNumber>{{object.phoneNumber}}</phoneNumber> <eMailAddress>{{object.eMailAddress}}</eMailAddress> </ContactPerson> </HolderOfTheTransitProcedure> </ns3:CC014C>
<!--_______________________________________Start of AT Footer_______________________________________--> </ns2:Msg>
